warnings.title: GoldmanCapitalBank
warnings.message: Be advised: exit-scam, possibly ponzi scheme, money laundering, unregistered financial institution. FMA is taking enforcement action against them.

warnings.title: Elevated risk of financial fraud
warnings.message: Always verify financial institutions before depositing funds. Unsure? Ask an FMA employee on the UK Discord Server, or open a DOC ticket to verify FI-status.
